notes: All 9 responses share one identical OCR error: the trailing underscore on validatePlaylistKeys_ is dropped in every rep (the GT flags this underscore as a hard discriminator). The responses separate on the final cleanup comment: only t0.7|rep2 captures 'by removing unnecessary information' verbatim; the rest drop 'removing' or drop the comment entirely. Repetition of Cache.compressTracks is the main failure mode (4x in t0.1|rep0, 2x in t0.4|rep1 and t0.7|rep1). t0.4|rep0 uniquely truncates the identifier AUJOURDHUI to AUJOURDHI across three keys. No response invented entirely new functions or strings — hallucinations are confined to repeated/duplicated real lines and the one truncated identifier.
